meta.notes: Fallback language. Keep wording aligned with official BMV/DMV terminology so EN-only mode rehearses the real test's phrasing.

strings.app.name: US Driver's License Practice
strings.app.tagline: Pass your US driver's license test — free, in your language
strings.gallery.unnamed: Official MUTCD sign — names are being added progressively
strings.review.tryAgainLater: Not yet — this one will come back
strings.review.doneBody: You reviewed all {count} questions. Great work!
strings.review.emptyBody: Study or take a practice test — missed questions will appear here for review.
strings.flash.tapToFlip: Tap the card to see the answer
strings.flash.emptyBody: No sign flashcards found for this state.
strings.test.rules: {total} questions: {signs} road signs + {rules} rules. You must get {minCorrect}/{sectionCount} in EACH section to pass.
strings.test.rules.overall: {total} questions: {signs} road signs + {rules} rules. You must get {minCorrect}/{total} correct overall to pass.
strings.test.timedOption: Timer (optional — the real test is untimed)
strings.history.title: Your history
strings.history.empty: No history yet. Study or take a practice test — your progress appears here.
strings.history.activityHint: Each bar is a day; taller means more questions, color shows accuracy.
strings.history.trendHint: Each bar covers 20 answers, oldest to newest.
strings.history.needMore: Answer a few more questions to see your weak areas.
strings.progress.noTests: No practice tests yet — try the Test tab!
strings.progress.noData: No data yet — start studying to see progress!
strings.progress.almostReady: Almost ready — review your weak areas
strings.progress.keepStudying: Keep studying a little every day!
strings.settings.title: Settings
strings.language.title: Choose your language
strings.language.subtitle: Pick the language shown on the main line. English is always shown underneath as the second line.
strings.picker.noResults: No matches. Try a different search.
strings.state.title: Choose your state
strings.state.subtitle: Every state has its own test rules and questions. Pick the state where you will take the test.
strings.pwa.installPrompt: Install the app to study offline
strings.pwa.iosInstallHint: On iPhone: tap Share, then 'Add to Home Screen'
